---
format:   
  dashboard:
    theme: yeti
    scrolling: false
    expandable: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r create-topojson}
#| echo: false     # hides the code
#| results: "hide" # hides printed output
#| message: false  # hides messages (e.g. from package loading)
#| warning: false  # hides warnings

library(sf)
library(rmapshaper)

dir.create("assets",
           recursive = TRUE,
           showWarnings = FALSE)

readr::read_csv("fsa-normal-grazing-period.csv") |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    id = paste0(`FIPS State Code`, `FIPS County Code`),
    year = `Program Year`,
    type = `Pasture Type`,
    start_date = `Grazing Period Start Date`,
    end_date = `Grazing Period End Date`,
    start_yday = lubridate::yday(`Grazing Period Start Date`),
    end_yday = lubridate::yday(`Grazing Period End Date`)) |>
  readr::write_csv(
    file.path("assets", "fsa-normal-grazing-period-simple.csv"),
    quote = "all")

## The US Census county definitions
## Create a simplified version

counties <-
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    tigris::counties(cb = TRUE, resolution = "5m") |>
      dplyr::transmute(VINTAGE = 2024L, STATEFP, COUNTYFP, STATE_NAME, NAME),
    tigris::counties(cb = TRUE, resolution = "5m", year = 2014) |>
      dplyr::left_join(
        tigris::states(cb = TRUE, resolution = "5m", year = 2014) |>
          dplyr::transmute(STATEFP, STATE_NAME = NAME) |>
          sf::st_drop_geometry()
      ) |>
      dplyr::arrange(STATEFP, COUNTYFP) |>
      dplyr::transmute(VINTAGE = 2014L, STATEFP, COUNTYFP, STATE_NAME, NAME)
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(STATEFP, COUNTYFP) |>
  dplyr::filter(VINTAGE == max(VINTAGE)) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::arrange(STATEFP, COUNTYFP) |>
  dplyr::filter(!(STATEFP %in% c("60", "78", "14", "52", "69", "66"))) |>
  sf::st_transform("WGS84") |>
  dplyr::transmute(id = paste0(STATEFP, COUNTYFP),
                   state = STATE_NAME,
                   county = NAME) |>
  dplyr::distinct()

counties <-
  counties |>
  dplyr::select(id) |>
  rmapshaper::ms_explode(sys = TRUE, sys_mem = 16) |>
  rmapshaper::ms_dissolve(field = "id", sys = TRUE, sys_mem = 16) |>
  rmapshaper::ms_simplify(keep = 0.5, sys = TRUE, sys_mem = 16) |>
  sf::st_make_valid() |>
  rmapshaper::ms_explode(sys = TRUE, sys_mem = 16) |>
  rmapshaper::ms_dissolve(field = "id", sys = TRUE, sys_mem = 16) |>
  rmapshaper::ms_explode(sys = TRUE, sys_mem = 16) |>
  tigris::shift_geometry() |>
  sf::st_make_valid() |>
  sf::st_transform("WGS84") |>
  rmapshaper::ms_explode(sys = TRUE, sys_mem = 16) |>
  rmapshaper::ms_dissolve(field = "id", sys = TRUE, sys_mem = 16) |>
  sf::st_cast("MULTIPOLYGON") |>
  dplyr::arrange(id) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    counties |>
      sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
      dplyr::distinct()
  )

sf::write_sf(counties, "assets/us-census-counties.geojson", delete_dsn = TRUE)

system(
  "
mapshaper \\
  assets/us-census-counties.geojson \\
  -clean rewind \\
  -rename-layers counties,states \\
  -dissolve field=state copy-fields='id' + name=states \\
  -each 'id=id.slice(0,2)' target=states \\
  -rename-layers counties,states \\
  -o format=topojson quantization=1e5 fix-geometry id-field='id' bbox target=* assets/us-census-counties.topojson
"
)

unlink("assets/us-census-counties.geojson")

```


```{r build-legend}
#| echo: false     # hides the code
#| results: "hide" # hides printed output
#| message: false  # hides messages (e.g. from package loading)
#| warning: false  # hides warnings

library(ggplot2)

## yday cyclic palette
dates <- seq(lubridate::as_date("1999-07-01"), lubridate::as_date("2000-06-30"), "1 day")
color_shift <- 250
colors <- as.character(khroma::color("romaO", reverse = TRUE)(366))
colors <- colors[c((color_shift + 1):366, 1:color_shift)]

yday_pal <-
  tibble::tibble(date = dates,
                 color = colors,
                 yday = lubridate::yday(dates)) |>
  dplyr::arrange(yday)

jsonlite::write_json(yday_pal$color, "assets/colors.json", auto_unbox = TRUE)

## yday cyclic legend
yday_legend <-
  yday_pal |>
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = date, y = 1, fill = color)) +
  geom_col(color = NA, linewidth = 0) +
  coord_polar(clip = "off") +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "month", date_labels = "%b") +
  ylim(-1, 1.25) +
  theme_void(base_size = 24) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(0.1, 0.1, 0.1, 0.1, unit = "in"))

ggsave(filename = "assets/legend.png",
       plot = yday_legend,
       device = ragg::agg_png,
       height = 2.5,
       width = 2.5,
       dpi = 150)
```


```{ojs inputs}
//| content: card-toolbar

// Create interactive inputs
viewof year = Inputs.range(
d3.extent(data, d => d.year),
{
step: 1, 
label: "Year",
value: 2026
}
)

viewof type = Inputs.select(
[...new Set(data.map(d => d.type))].sort(),
{
label: "Forage Type",
value: "Native Pasture"
}
)

viewof variable = Inputs.radio(
new Map([
["Season Start", "start_yday"], 
["Season End", "end_yday"]
]),
{
label: "Color by",
value: "start_yday"
}
)
```

```{ojs read-data}
//| output: false

formatDate = d3.utcFormat("%b %d, %Y")

us = await d3.json("assets/us-census-counties.topojson")
counties = topojson.feature(us, us.objects.counties)
states = topojson.mesh(us, us.objects.states, (a, b) => a !== b)

data = FileAttachment("assets/fsa-normal-grazing-period-simple.csv").csv({typed: true})

romaO = FileAttachment("assets/colors.json").json()
color = d3.scaleSequential()
  .domain([1, 366])
  .interpolator(t => romaO[Math.floor(t * (romaO.length - 1))])

```

```{ojs filter-join-data}
//| output: false

filtered = data.filter(d => d.year === year && d.type === type)

countiesFiltered = {
  const rowById = Object.fromEntries(
    filtered.map(d => [String(d.id).padStart(5, "0"), d])
  );

  return {
    type: "FeatureCollection",
    features: counties.features.map(f => {
      const row = rowById[String(f.id)];
      return {
        ...f,
        properties: {
          id: f.id,
          ...f.properties,
          ...(row ?? {}),
          value: row ? row[variable] : null
        }
      };
    })
  };
}

```

```{ojs cardsize}
//| output: false

// Reactive card dimensions — uses #map (created by Quarto from label: map) to find the card body
cardSize = Generators.observe(notify => {
  let ro;
  const check = setInterval(() => {
    const cardBody = document.querySelector('#map')?.closest('.card-body');
    if (cardBody) {
      clearInterval(check);
      ro = new ResizeObserver(([entry]) => {
        const { width, height } = entry.contentRect;
        if (width > 0 && height > 0) notify({ width, height });
      });
      ro.observe(cardBody);
    }
  }, 50);
  return () => {
    clearInterval(check);
    if (ro) ro.disconnect();
  };
})
```

```{ojs}
//| label: map
//| title: FSA Normal Grazing Periods

Plot.plot({
  width: cardSize.width,
  height: cardSize.height,
  projection: {
    type: "albers",
    domain: counties
  },
  grid: true,
  color: {legend: false},
  marks: [
    Plot.geo(countiesFiltered, {
      fill: d => d.properties.value != null ? color(d.properties.value) : "#ccc"
    }),

    Plot.dot(
      countiesFiltered.features.map(f => {
        const [x, y] = d3.geoCentroid(f);
        return {
          ...f.properties,
          x,
          y
        };
      }),
      {
        x: "x",
        y: "y",
        r: 3,
        fill: "transparent",
        stroke: "none",
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.county} County, ${d.state}
FIPS: ${String(d.id).padStart(5, "0")}
Crop Type: ${type}
Start: ${d.start_date ? formatDate(d.start_date) : "None"}
End: ${d.end_date ? formatDate(d.end_date) : "None"}`
      }
    ),

    Plot.geo(states, {stroke: "white"}),
    Plot.image([{}], { x: -76, y: 30,
      width: 100,
      sheight: 100,
      src: () => "assets/legend.png"}),
  ]
})

```
